atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a past medical history of prior discectomy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain that began five days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling something in his lower right back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports his wife made him push the refrigerator.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally takes tylenol and ibuprofen together.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any neurological symptoms such as numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies abdominal pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with a lumbar strain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a lumbar strain, likely secondary to the recent incident with the refrigerator.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The MRI is ordered to rule out other potential causes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15 mg once daily for pain management.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ultram 50 mg every four hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician denies referral to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders referral to physical therapy after the MRI results are available.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to discontinue ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue with tylenol if desired.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment to assess progress and adjust treatment as needed.
